description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in dark shingles. The front facade showcases a spacious wooden porch with exposed beams and posts, providing a sheltered outdoor area. The exterior walls are primarily constructed of brick, lending a sturdy and classic appearance, while the porch and some side elements are framed in natural wood. Large glass doors and windows are visible at the front, allowing ample natural light into the main living area. The rear of the bungalow includes a wide garage door, indicating integrated vehicle storage. The building sits on a concrete foundation with a surrounding paved area, suitable for urban or suburban placement.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a dark gable roof, spacious wooden porch, and integrated garage, set on a concrete foundation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large wooden porch with exposed beams, glass entry doors, and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the wooden porch structure, and the solid brick wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide garage door and the full expanse of the gable roof, with brickwork dominating the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick wall, side entrance to the porch, and the open wooden framework of the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front glass doors and minimal side windows
